notes: Decode-isolation experiment for MiniMax M2.7 AutoRound on 4x Arc Pro B70. Uses experimental llm-scaler ESIMD INT4 MoE path with FP16 activations and in-place signed compact int4 expert weights. Strong p1/n128 decode result, but not a default full-context setting yet: p512/n128 regressed because prefill also used this prototype path.

engineFlags.commandSnippet: VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE=1 vllm bench throughput --backend vllm --model /mnt/corsair-external/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --tokenizer /mnt/corsair-external/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --trust-remote-code --dtype float16 --tensor-parallel-size 4 --distributed-executor-backend mp --max-model-len 512 --max-num-batched-tokens 256 --max-num-seqs 1 --dataset-name random --random-input-len 1 --random-output-len 128 --random-range-ratio 0 --num-prompts 1 --disable-log-stats
engineFlags.extraFlags: XPU/Level Zero; experimental llm-scaler ESIMD INT4 MoE path; CCL_ZE_IPC_EXCHANGE=pidfd; CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1; VLLM_XPU_ENABLE_XPU_GRAPH=0; VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE=1; dtype=float16
